final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [2:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
